app.name: DomestIQ
search.title: Fumana Abasebenzi
consent.title: Imvume Yabucala
consent.message: Siqokelela kwaye sicubungula iinkcukacha zakho ngokuhambelana nomthetho we-POPI Act. Ngokuqhubeka, uyavuma iindlela zethu zokusetyenziswa kwedatha yakho.
landing.hero.subtext: Abantu abagcina amakhaya oMzantsi Afrika esebenza bafanelwe kokukhulu kunokuthetha-thetha. DomestIQ ixhumanisa abasebenzi namakhaya ngqo — ngeeprofayile eziqinisekisiweyo, izimvo zenyaniso, nabasebenzi bagcina yonke imali abayenzayo.
landing.problem.waiting_desc: Abasebenzi abanamakhono bahlala ngaphandle kwamasango amayure, benethemba lokuba kukho umntu ozabafuna namhlanje.
landing.problem.door_desc: Akukho ID, akukho zimvo, akukho zincomelo. Kufuneka unethemba nje lokuba lo mntu nguye ngokwenene.
landing.problem.cash_desc: Akukho mntu ubhale phantsi. Akukho bungqina bomsebenzi owenziweyo. Ukuba imali ayonelanga, yaphelela apho.
landing.worker.body: Akusafuneki ukuhlala ulinda. Akusafuneki ukuqala ekuqaleni ngaxa wonke xa ulahlekelwa likhasimende. Yakha iprofayile yakho kanye — izimvo, izincomelo, negama lakho ziyakulandela naphi na.
landing.worker.b1_desc: Imisebenzi iza kwifowuni yakho. Akusafuneki ukuhlala emasangweni okanye ukubuza.
landing.worker.b2_desc: Wonke umsebenzi omhle ufumana uluvo. Lonke uluvo luzisa umsebenzi olandelayo. Awuphindi uqale phantsi.
landing.worker.b3_desc: Amakhasimende nawo aqinisekisiwe. Bona ukuba uya phi phambi kokuba ufike.
landing.worker.b4_desc: Bhalisa ngefowuni yakho nje. Cofa izithombe ukhethe izakhono zakho — akukho kuthayipha, akukho mafom.
landing.worker.b5_desc: Sebenzisa DomestIQ ngesiXhosa, isiZulu, Sesotho, Afrikaans — zonke iilwimi ze-SA eziyi-11.
landing.worker.b6_desc: Asithathi nto kumvuzo wakho. Hayi ngoku, hayi nini.
landing.worker.b7_desc: Uyazi umntu olungileyo? Yabelana ngekhowudi yakho. Xa bezibhalisile, nobabini niyafumana.
landing.worker.b8_desc: Yakha i-CV yobuchwephesha usuka kwiprofayile yakho. Dawunlowda i-PDF uyisebenzise naphi na — yeyakho.
landing.cv.body: Izakhono zakho, imbali yomsebenzi, nezimvo zakho — kuguqulelwa kuxwebhu olufanelekileyo onokulunika nabani na. Hayi ye-DomestIQ kuphela. Yeyakho.
landing.cv.step3: Dawunlowda i-PDF — simahla, ngawo onke amaxesha
landing.cv.portable: I-CV yakho isebenza naphi na. Iyiprinte. Iyithumele nge-imeyile. Iyinike esangweni.
landing.client.body: Ii-ID eziqinisekisiweyo. Ukuhlolwa kwemvelaphi. Izimvo zenyaniso ezivela kumakhaya afana nelakho. Yeka ukuthembela kumhlobo womhlobo uze uqale uqeshe ngolwazi lokwenene.
landing.client.b1_desc: Wonke umsebenzi angaqinisekisa i-ID yakhe yase-SA nokukhululwa kolwaphulo-mthetho. Ubona ibheji phambi kokubhukha.
landing.client.b2_desc: Izilinganiso ezivela kumakhaya okwenene. Izincomelo ezibhaliweyo ongazifunda phambi kokuthatha isigqibo.
landing.client.b3_desc: Bona abasebenzi kwindawo yakho, bahlelwe ngomgama. Fumana umntu okufutshane nawe.
landing.client.b4_desc: Kanye okanye rhoqo. Khetha umhla, khetha ixesha, thumela isicelo. Kugqityiwe.
landing.how.ws1_desc: Cofa izithombe ukhethe izakhono zakho. Akukho kuthayipha, akukho mafom, akukho imeyile efunekayo.
landing.how.ws2_desc: Iprofayile yakho, isilinganiso, nokufumaneka kwakho kubonakala xa abantu bekhangela kwindawo yakho.
landing.how.ws3_desc: Yamkela okanye yala. Beka amaxabiso akho neshedyuli yakho. Uyalawula.
landing.how.ws4_desc: Umsebenzi omhle ufumana izimvo. Izimvo zizisa iibhukhingi ezininzi. Kuyanda.
landing.how.cs2_desc: Funda izimvo, bona iibheji zokuqinisekisa, jonga imbali yomsebenzi.
landing.how.cs3_desc: Thumela isicelo okanye uncokole kuqala. Lungiselelani iinkcukacha phakathi kwenu.
landing.how.cs4_desc: Isilinganiso sakho sinceda abasebenzi abalungileyo babonakale. Kugcina uluntu lukwinyani.
landing.services.subtext: Ukusuka kuncedo lwemihla ngemihla ukuya kumakhono obuchwephesha. Abasebenzi babhalisa abakwenzayo. Ufumana kanye lowo umfunayo.
landing.stories.s1_quote: Bendiqhele ukulinda iiveki phakathi kwemisebenzi. Ngoku ndifumana iibhukhingi qho ngeveki. Abantwana bam bangakwazi ukutya kakuhle.
landing.stories.s2_quote: Andikwazi ukufunda kakuhle kodwa izithombe zenza kube lula. Ndizibhalise ndedwa. Akukho mntu undincedileyo.
landing.stories.s3_quote: Ngaphambili, bendingenazo iziqinisekiso. Ngoku izimvo zam zithetha ngam. Amakhasimende andithemba ndingekafiki.
landing.stories.s4_quote: Ukufumana umntu endimthembayo bekusoloko kuthetha ukubuza abahlobo uthembe okuhle. Akusenjalo.
landing.stories.s5_quote: Ndiyazi ukuba ngubani oza endlwini yam. Xa unabantwana, oko kubaluleke ngaphezu kwayo yonke into.
landing.stories.s6_quote: Ndibeka amaxabiso am. Akukho mntu uthatha isabelo. Ndenze R8,000 ngenyanga edlulileyo nge-DomestIQ kuphela.
landing.cta.heading_2: Lifikile ixesha lokuba usebenzele wonke umntu.
landing.cta.body: Wonke umsebenzi owakha iprofayile yakhe udala ubungqina bezakhono zakhe. Wonke umuzi obhukha nge-DomestIQ wakha ukuthembana kule nkqubo. Siyilungisa ngolu hlobo — uxhumaniso oluqinisekisiweyo olunye ngexesha.
landing.footer.disclaimer: DomestIQ liqonga lokuxhumanisa. Akukho budlelane bokuqeshwa obudalwayo phakathi kwabasebenzisi.
landing.trust.t1_desc: Idatha yakho ikhuselwe phantsi komthetho waseMzantsi Afrika
landing.trust.t2_desc: I-ID yaseMzantsi Afrika ihlolwe liqela lethu
landing.trust.t3_desc: Ncokola kweqonga — akukho iinombolo zobuqu ezabelwayo
landing.faq.a1: Ewe. Abasebenzi bagcina wonke uRandi — asithathi khomishini. Iqonga lixhaswa yimali encinci yenkonzo ekhokhwa ngamakhaya xa ebhukha.
landing.faq.a2: Nayiphi ifowuni ene-intanethi iyasebenza. DomestIQ isebenza kwibhrawuza yakho — Android okanye iPhone. Akufuneki ukudawunlowda. Ungade uyifake kwisikrini sasekhaya njengeapp.
landing.faq.a3: Abasebenzi balayisha i-ID yase-SA nesatifiketi sokukhululwa kolwaphulo-mthetho. Iqela lethu lihlola amaxwebhu lize linike ibheji yegolide. Abasebenzi abaqinisekisiweyo bafumana iibhukhingi ezininzi.
landing.faq.a4: Ngokupheleleyo. Ihambelana ne-POPIA. Idatha yakho iyinkripthiwe, ayithengiswa, kwaye yabelwana ngayo kuphela ngemvume yakho.
landing.faq.a5: Joburg, Cape Town, Durban, Pretoria, PE, neendawo ezininzi nyanga nganye. Bhalisa ngoku nangona indawo yakho ingekabandakanywa — siyanwenwela ngokukhawuleza.
landing.faq.a6: Khangela umsebenzi, hlola iprofayile nezimvo, ucele umhla nexesha. Umsebenzi uyamkela okanye uyala. Ungade uncokole naye kuqala nilungiselelane iinkcukacha.
landing.faq.a7: Ewe — wexeshana okanye rhoqo, kokubini kuyasebenza. Ufuna ukucoca okunzulu ngalo Mgqibelo okanye umgcini-gadi veki nganye? Kunoma yeyiphi.
landing.faq.a8: Zonke iilwimi ze-SA eziyi-11 ezisemthethweni — isiNgesi, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Afrikaans, Sesotho, nezinye. Abasebenzi bangabhalisa baze bancokole ngolwimi abaluthandayo.
landing.cities.subtext: Abasebenzi namakhaya baxhuma kwiidolophu ezinkulu. Iidolophu ezininzi nyanga nganye.
landing.cities.not_listed: Awuliboni idolophu yakho? Bhalisa nangona kunjalo — siyanwenwela ngokukhawuleza.
landing.pwa.title: Faka DomestIQ Kwisikrini Sasekhaya
landing.pwa.desc: Fumana ukufikelela okukhawulezayo kwiibhukhingi, imiyalezo, nokunye.
